CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Minimum bass gain – lower value for bass response
CONTROLS.NAME: min_bass_gain

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Maximum bass gain – upper value for bass response
CONTROLS.NAME: max_bass_gain

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Main bass gain – multiplier for bass visualization intensity
CONTROLS.NAME: main_bass_gain

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Bass threshold low – lower smoothstep edge for FFT visualization
CONTROLS.NAME: low_bass_edge

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Bass threshold high – upper smoothstep edge for FFT visualization
CONTROLS.NAME: high_bass_edge

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Drop ball – reset the bouncing ball to starting position
CONTROLS.NAME: drop_ball

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: CRT effect – screen distortion and scanline intensity
CONTROLS.NAME: crt_effect

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Mix mode – blend mode for media layer (0=brightness, 1=alpha)
CONTROLS.NAME: mix_mode

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Camera rotation X – rotation speed around xz-plane
CONTROLS.NAME: rotation_speed_0

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Camera rotation Y – rotation speed around xy-plane
CONTROLS.NAME: rotation_speed_1

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Reflection mode – blend between diffuse and specular (0=diffuse, 1=shiny)
CONTROLS.NAME: reflection_mode

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Motion blur – temporal smoothing for reduced noise
CONTROLS.NAME: motion_blur

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Sky mode – star field and background intensity
CONTROLS.NAME: sky_mode

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Sun mode – sun glow intensity in the scene
CONTROLS.NAME: sun_mode
